input_dict.question: Which artist did Anthony Toby "Tony" Hiller appear with that liked showering himself (and others) with confetti?
input_dict.source_summary: Tony Hiller (as part of The Hiller Brothers) appeared with Rip Taylor; Rip Taylor is the performer known for showering himself (and others) with confetti, and passage [1] lists Rip Taylor among artists The Hiller Brothers appeared with.
input_dict.target_summary: Anthony Toby "Tony" Hiller (born 30 July 1927) began his musical career as a member of the song-and-dance duo The Hiller Brothers. The Hiller Brothers "appeared with many artists of the time including ... Rip Taylor." From the upstream context, Rip Taylor "is known for his exuberance ... including his habit of showering himself (and others) with confetti." Retain these linked facts: Tony Hiller/The Hiller Brothers performed with Rip Taylor, and Rip Taylor is described as the performer who showered himself and others with confetti.
